title: Bounded loop classification
optimization_role: Enables route-class specialization and dead-loop elimination.
notes: Classify loops as bounded, unbounded, or non-looping during planning.

title: Bounded loop budget policy
optimization_role: Allows static caps and preallocation.
notes: Declare max items, max bytes, max chunks, max parts, max records, and max elapsed time.

title: Batch validation for bounded loops
impacted_tigrbl_surface: wire atoms; validators; generated route executors
optimization_role: Reduces per-item validation overhead.
notes: Batch validate repeated items where schemas are identical.

title: Batch reducer fusion
optimization_role: Fuses pure reducers across repeated items.
notes: Requires reducer purity/read-write metadata.

title: Batch persistence for bounded loops
impacted_tigrbl_surface: DB effecters; persistence atoms; transaction planner
optimization_role: Reduces DB round trips when policy allows.
notes: Applicable to REST bulk, JSON-RPC batch, and windowed stream processing.

title: Bounded loop error aggregation
optimization_role: Avoids per-item error path explosion.
notes: Define per-item, per-window, and whole-batch failure behavior.

title: Bounded loop transaction policy
optimization_role: Lets planner choose single_tx, per_item_tx, per_window_tx, or no_tx.
notes: Needed before optimizing persistence or batch failures.

title: Bounded loop result aggregation
optimization_role: Enables preallocated output arrays and streaming aggregation.
notes: Define whether repeated outputs are collected, streamed, or partially emitted.

title: Bounded loop window planning
impacted_tigrbl_surface: planner; stream atoms; DB cursor adapters
optimization_role: Controls chunk/page/window sizes for throughput and memory.
notes: Covers streaming DB reads, uploads, replay windows, and batch frames.

title: Bounded loop preallocation
optimization_role: Avoids repeated allocation inside bounded loops.
notes: Depends on budget policy and result aggregation.

title: Vectorized decode for bounded loops
optimization_role: Reduces repeated decode overhead for homogeneous records.
notes: Useful for JSON arrays, batch frames, and bulk payloads.

title: Vectorized encode for bounded loops
optimization_role: Reduces repeated output encoding overhead.
notes: Useful for batch responses and paginated result windows.

title: Bounded loop short-circuit policy
optimization_role: Avoids unnecessary work after terminal failure.
notes: Define continue-on-error, stop-on-first-error, and partial-success policies.

title: Bounded loop partial success policy
optimization_role: Allows optimized success/error partitioning.
notes: Important for JSON-RPC batch, bulk ops, and multipart handling.

title: Bounded loop hot/cold split
optimization_role: Keeps diagnostic projection out of the repeated item loop.
notes: Rich contract objects should be cold unless explicitly enabled.

title: Unbounded loop classification
optimization_role: Identifies live/session loops and avoids one-shot assumptions.
notes: Classify session/live-stream loops during planning.

title: Unbounded loop fairness
optimization_role: Prevents one session/stream from monopolizing execution.
notes: Required for long-lived SSE, WebSocket, and WebTransport loops.

title: Unbounded loop yield checkpoints
optimization_role: Places explicit scheduler yield points in generated loops.
notes: Needed for fairness and cancellation responsiveness.

title: Unbounded loop cancellation
optimization_role: Stops producers/consumers promptly and safely.
notes: Propagate cancellation through handlers and cleanup paths.

title: Unbounded loop deadline and timeout policy
optimization_role: Bounds wall-clock resource ownership.
notes: Support idle timeout, max duration, per-iteration timeout, and deadlines.

title: Unbounded loop backpressure
impacted_tigrbl_surface: egress atoms; emit atoms; loop executor
optimization_role: Avoids unbounded queues and overproduction.
notes: Respect transport readiness before producing more chunks/messages/datagrams.

title: Unbounded loop memory bound
optimization_role: Keeps buffering bounded.
notes: Reject, slow, or drop according to policy when buffers exceed limits.

title: Unbounded loop heartbeat
optimization_role: Maintains session liveness without starving data paths.
notes: Govern heartbeat interval, missed heartbeat policy, and close behavior.

title: Unbounded loop rate and work budget
optimization_role: Bounds CPU/work per session and route.
notes: Apply per-session, per-route, and per-window budgets.

title: Unbounded loop cleanup
impacted_tigrbl_surface: cleanup atoms; error chains; lifecycle hooks
optimization_role: Prevents leaked session, stream, task, and buffer state.
notes: Run deterministic cleanup on disconnect, cancellation, timeout, close, or error.

title: Session prebinding for unbounded loops
optimization_role: Eliminates path/scope rematch after session open.
notes: Bind route/op/message/stream/datagram plans once at session open.

title: Path rematch elision
optimization_role: Removes repeated path matching from message/frame loops.
notes: Depends on session prebinding.

title: Method rematch minimization
impacted_tigrbl_surface: message dispatch; stream dispatch; datagram dispatch
optimization_role: Uses compact discriminators instead of string lookups.
notes: Applicable to message kind, stream kind, datagram kind, and subprotocol discriminators.

title: Loop body specialization
optimization_role: Compiles skinny loop bodies per route class.
notes: Reduces k by removing generic loop branches.

title: Zero-copy emit for unbounded loops
optimization_role: Avoids avoidable chunk/frame/datagram copies.
notes: Requires payload lifetime and ownership rules.

title: Completion coalescing
optimization_role: Reduces completion event overhead where policy allows.
notes: Must preserve observable completion semantics.

title: Cold diagnostics split for unbounded loops
optimization_role: Keeps rich contract diagnostics out of hot loops.
notes: Diagnostics reconstruct from compact IDs unless explicitly enabled.

title: Preallocated frame state
optimization_role: Reduces per-iteration allocations.
notes: Useful for WebSocket and WebTransport hot loops.

title: Unbounded loop queue policy
optimization_role: Defines queue size, overflow behavior, and drop/slow/close policy.
notes: Complements memory bounds and backpressure.

title: Fair multiplexing across substreams
optimization_role: Avoids starvation among streams/datagrams in one session.
notes: Especially important for WebTransport.

title: Abort propagation
impacted_tigrbl_surface: stream handlers; producer tasks; cleanup atoms
optimization_role: Propagates abort from transport to producers and reducers.
notes: Needed for HTTP streams and WebTransport streams.

title: Producer cancellation
impacted_tigrbl_surface: stream producers; SSE producers; DB tail producers
optimization_role: Cancels upstream producers when clients disconnect or budgets expire.
notes: Prevents source loops from surviving after transport close.

title: Reconnect and resume policy
contract_surface: SSE last_event_id; session ids; stream ids
optimization_role: Supports bounded resume/replay while keeping live loops bounded by policy.
notes: Primarily useful for SSE and durable session protocols.
